Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Man, this sucks... Guess I don't have much choice with Kirijo-senpai getting on my case.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 2 25 25}She was like, "If you fail your midterm, there will be consequences." I feared for my life for a second![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 3 25 25}You guys are my only hope! Gimme a hand here... Pleeease?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}You can start by taking this seriously. You've been distracted this whole time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}As they say, it pays to be prepared! Gotta get myself in the right mindset first, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}A good study session needs a clean and organized workspace and the perfect mood for learning.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}And so, to set that mood, I, Junpei Iori, volunteer![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}What? Where is this coming from?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}You there, young man! What lecture would you like to hear from the great Junpei? History? Arithmetic? Literature?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}So you'd like to hear about history, huh? Well then...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}This one's about a certain archeological team. They spent their whole lives excavating, only to find nothing. In the end...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}If you say, "their career was in ruins," I will hit you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Aw, come on, don't steal the punchline! And don't hit me, either...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Something on arithmetic, huh? Understood.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Long ago, they tried to teach math to a sheepdog. The farmer asked, "What's five plus four?" But then it barked ten times.[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 4 23 0 3 1 25 25}He asked for nine times two, and it barked twenty times. Guess old habits die hard for the sheepdog. It couldn't stop rounding them up![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Ugh... I wish I could cut you out of the equation.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Aha, a man of culture. Literature it is, then...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Have you ever read the famous dystopian science fiction novel "1984"?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Ugh... I'd really like to close the book on this chapter.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Look, we all need a breather sometimes! What'd ya think about the great Junpei's lecture, {f 4 2}?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Right? Can't have a good study session without a good break![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Oh, please. Don't let yourself get infected by Junpei's influence.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Seriously... Okay, Junpei, no more opening your mouth. You can breathe, I guess, but that's it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Then what's the point of studying together!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 9 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}Ah, quite the studious young man, aren't you? Then allow me to give you my best lecture yet![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}Ugh! Stupei, you're starting to infect {f 4 1}-kun's mind too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}If we keep humoring you, it's going to impact our studies too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}Or maybe we should just let you fail. Find out what Kirijo-senpai's "consequences" are like firsthand.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}Whoa, whoa, whoa, let's not get hasty here! I was just joking around![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}I'll get serious, I swear! Don't abandon meee![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We all got down to business and[n]continued studying for the test...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}So this goes like that... and then you take that and carry it over to here... and then, uhh...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}Hey, {f 4 2}... You mind givin' me a little help with this one?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}Oh, look who's actually putting the effort in! That wasn't so bad, was it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}About that joke I was telling earlier... Should I pause before the punchline, or go with the flow?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 11 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}...{f 4 1}-kun, why don't we just pretend this guy doesn't exist and study on our own?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}Whew... I guess that's enough studying for today. Thanks to you, I got a lot more done![n]{f 1 1}
